tasks.label: ESP8266: Build
tasks.command: bash -c 'rm -f build/CMakeCache.txt && cp sdkconfig.esp8266 sdkconfig && source ~/esp/ESP8266_RTOS_SDK/export.sh && idf.py build'

tasks.label: ESP8266: Flash & Monitor
tasks.command: bash -c 'rm -f build/CMakeCache.txt && cp sdkconfig.esp8266 sdkconfig && source ~/esp/ESP8266_RTOS_SDK/export.sh && idf.py -p /dev/ttyUSB0 -b 74880 flash monitor'

tasks.label: ESP8266: Menuconfig
tasks.command: bash -c 'cp sdkconfig.esp8266 sdkconfig && source ~/esp/ESP8266_RTOS_SDK/export.sh && idf.py menuconfig && cp sdkconfig sdkconfig.esp8266'

tasks.label: ESP32: Build
tasks.command: bash -c 'rm -f build/CMakeCache.txt && cp sdkconfig.esp32 sdkconfig && source ~/esp/esp-idf-v6.1/export.sh && idf.py build'

tasks.label: ESP32: Flash & Monitor
tasks.command: bash -c 'rm -f build/CMakeCache.txt && cp sdkconfig.esp32 sdkconfig && source ~/esp/esp-idf-v6.1/export.sh && idf.py -p /dev/ttyUSB0 -b 115200 flash monitor'

tasks.label: ESP32: Menuconfig
tasks.command: bash -c 'cp sdkconfig.esp32 sdkconfig && source ~/esp/esp-idf-v6.1/export.sh && idf.py menuconfig && cp sdkconfig sdkconfig.esp32'
